items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: A critically appraised paper's synopsis indicated that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 移动式肺康复对COPD患者的运动能力改善效果与中心内康复相当，且对健康状况的改善更优。这意味着如果你面对因地理、交通等原因无法进行中心内康复的COPD患者，移动式方案是可行的替代甚至更优解。
items.titleZh: 评论性评估论文：基于移动设备的肺康复对COPD患者运动能力的改善效果与中心内康复相当，对健康状况的改善更优
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论性评估论文的摘要指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD），基于移动设备的肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心内康复效果相当，且对健康状况的改善更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD patients. This means that if you have COPD patients who cannot access center-based rehabilitation due to geographical or transportation barriers, mobile-based solutions are a viable, and potentially superior, alternative.

items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
items.summary: This synopsis reviews a study indicating that for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone.
items.curatedReason: 针对退行性半月板撕裂，在家庭锻炼基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能显著改善疼痛。这意味着目前证据不支持复杂干预优于简单家庭方案，继续坚持主动训练是核心。
items.titleZh: 评价论文：退行性半月板撕裂及膝痛患者，额外增加物理治疗或激励短信不比单纯居家锻炼更能改善疼痛
items.summaryZh: 一篇论文综述指出，针对退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，在家庭锻炼基础上增加物理治疗或激励短信，未能比单纯家庭锻炼更显著地改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tears, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages to home exercise doesn't significantly improve pain. This suggests that current evidence doesn't support complex interventions as superior to simple home programs; active training remains central.

items.title: Incremental predictive value of spatiotemporal gait parameters beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients: A retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that spatiotemporal gait parameters offer incremental predictive value beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估（如FAC）具有增量预测价值。这意味着使用步态分析仪能更精细地评估患者的预后，并为康复方案提供更具体的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 亚急性卒中患者步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面的增量预测价值：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估具有增量预测价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: In subacute stroke patients, spatiotemporal gait parameters provide incremental predictive value beyond traditional clinical assessments (e.g., FAC) for achieving independent outdoor ambulation. This implies that instrumented gait analysis can offer a more refined prognostic assessment and provide more specific data to guide rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且仅限于亚急性卒中患者。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to confounding and selection bias, and is limited to subacute stroke patients.

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), aiming to help young, active patients understand the benefits and risks of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy.
items.curatedReason: 这份混合方法研究描述了FAIS患者决策辅助工具的开发过程，旨在帮助年轻活跃人群权衡保守治疗与髋关节镜手术的利弊。工具本身尚处于开发和用户测试阶段，但提示了未来患者教育的潜在方向。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究开发并用户测试了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAIS）的患者决策辅助工具，旨在帮助年轻活跃患者理解非手术管理与髋关节镜手术的潜在益处和风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mixed-methods study details the development of a patient decision aid for FAIS, aiming to help young, active individuals weigh the pros and cons of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy. While the tool is still in development and user-testing, it suggests a potential direction for future patient education.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于工具的开发和初步用户测试，未评估其临床有效性和长期结果。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to the development and initial user-testing of the tool, without evaluating its clinical effectiveness or long-term outcomes.

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: A process evaluation study described how the Live Long Walk Strong physical therapy program, designed to improve mobility in older adults, was adapted across four diverse clinical settings.
items.curatedReason: Live Long Walk Strong项目在不同临床环境中实施的实践证据表明，物理治疗项目可以通过适应性调整来扩大覆盖范围，改善老年人的移动能力。这提示你，现有循证项目在推广时，应重视根据实际环境进行合理本地化。
items.titleZh: 实施“健步强身”项目：一项关于物理治疗项目在不同背景下适应性调整的实践证据研究
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估研究描述了旨在改善老年人移动能力的物理治疗项目“健步强身”如何在四个不同临床环境中进行适应性调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: Practice-based evidence on the implementation of the Live Long Walk Strong program across diverse clinical contexts shows that physical therapy programs can expand their reach and improve mobility in older adults through adaptive modifications. This suggests that when disseminating existing evidence-based programs, you should prioritize reasonable localization based on the actual environment.
items.limitation: 这是一项过程评估研究，主要关注程序适应性，而非项目本身的临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a process evaluation study, focusing primarily on program adaptability rather than the clinical efficacy of the program itself.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 84 hospitalized rehabilitation patients found good inter-rater reliability and construct validity for a Movement Quality Score (MQS) within the Standard Physical Therapy Assessment (SPTA) across neurological, musculoskeletal, and internal medical conditions.
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分 (MQS) 在住院康复患者中表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度，无论患者诊断如何。在跨诊断人群中使用 MQS，你将有更可靠的基线评估工具。
items.titleZh: 跨诊断运动质量评分在康复评估中的评估者间信度和结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院康复患者进行的横断面研究发现，标准物理治疗评估 (SPTA) 中的运动质量评分 (MQS) 在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科疾病患者中均表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Movement Quality Score (MQS) shows good inter-rater reliability and construct validity across diverse diagnostic groups in inpatient rehabilitation. You'll find MQS a more reliable baseline assessment tool for cross-diagnostic populations.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于住院患者，可能限制结果向门诊或社区康复环境的推广。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to hospitalized patients, which may restrict generalizability to outpatient or community rehabilitation settings.

items.title: Living with spinal cord injury in the community of Bangladesh: a comprehensive analysis using the ICF framework.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Bangladesh analyzed functioning, environmental, and personal factors among 773 individuals with spinal cord injury using the ICF framework, providing a comprehensive understanding of community living challenges.
items.curatedReason: 这项在孟加拉国的横断面研究深入分析了社区脊髓损伤患者的功能限制和相关因素，强调了环境和个人因素的关键作用。你可以借鉴 ICF 框架来更全面地评估和干预你所在社区的脊髓损伤患者。
items.titleZh: 孟加拉国社区脊髓损伤患者生活状况：基于 ICF 框架的综合分析
items.summaryZh: 一项在孟加拉国进行的横断面研究，使用 ICF 框架分析了 773 名脊髓损伤患者的功能、环境和个人因素，全面了解了其社区生活面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Bangladesh offers an in-depth analysis of functional limitations and associated factors in community-dwelling individuals with spinal cord injury, highlighting the crucial role of environmental and personal factors. You can leverage the ICF framework for a more comprehensive assessment and intervention approach for SCI patients in your community.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，也无法追踪功能限制和因素随时间的变化。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents the establishment of causality and cannot track changes in functional limitations and factors over time.

items.title: Implementation and evaluation of a stroke sexual health practice profile for rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada.
items.summary: A Quality Improvement Initiative in Ontario, Canada, successfully implemented and evaluated a structured, team-based approach to integrate sexual health into stroke rehabilitation, using the PLISSIT model and a Stroke Sexual Health Practice Profile.
items.curatedReason: 该研究成功地在加拿大安大略省的卒中康复中整合了性健康实践。在你的实践中，若面临类似患者群体，可以借鉴这种基于团队的结构化方法。
items.titleZh: 在加拿大安大略省实施和评估卒中康复性健康实践规范
items.summaryZh: 加拿大安大略省的一项质量改进倡议成功实施并评估了一种结构化、基于团队的方法，利用 PLISSIT 模型和卒中性健康实践规范，将性健康融入卒中康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study successfully integrated sexual health practices into stroke rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada. If you encounter similar patient populations in your practice, you can draw on this team-based, structured approach.
items.limitation: 研究设计为质量改进倡议，缺乏对照组和随机化，可能无法完全归因于干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study design was a quality improvement initiative, lacking a control group and randomization, so the effectiveness cannot be fully attributed to the intervention.

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: This review examines current literature on the evaluation and management of labral pathology with associated glenohumeral instability in athletes, noting that glenoid labral tears account for over 10% of surgically managed shoulder injuries.
items.curatedReason: 本综述为运动员肩盂盂唇损伤合并不稳的评估和管理提供了最新文献概览。这对于你在运动人群中处理复杂肩关节问题有帮助。
items.titleZh: 运动员肩盂盂唇撕裂合并盂肱关节不稳的治疗
items.summaryZh: 本综述考察了运动员肩盂盂唇病变合并盂肱关节不稳的评估和管理最新文献，指出盂唇撕裂占手术治疗肩损伤的10%以上。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers an updated overview of the literature on the evaluation and management of labral tears with associated glenohumeral instability in athletes. This will help you manage complex shoulder issues in athletic populations.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述性文章，其证据强度取决于所引用研究的质量和偏倚风险。
items.limitationEn: This is a review article, and its strength of evidence depends on the quality and bias risk of the cited studies.

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: This review provides an evidence-based approach to the physiotherapy management of Long-COVID, a heterogenous and multisystemic condition following SARS-CoV-2 infection with uncertain precise pathophysiological causes.
items.curatedReason: Long-COVID 的物理治疗管理需要证据指导，本综述提供了当前可用的循证方法。这有助于你在面对长新冠患者时，基于现有证据制定干预策略。
items.titleZh: 长新冠的物理治疗管理：一种循证方法
items.summaryZh: 本综述为长新冠的物理治疗管理提供了一种循证方法。长新冠是一种异质性、多系统疾病，其确切病理生理学原因尚不明确。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapy management for Long-COVID requires evidence-based guidance, and this review provides current approaches. This will help you develop intervention strategies for Long-COVID patients based on available evidence.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，其结论的强度取决于所纳入研究的质量，且长新冠的病理生理学机制仍在探索中。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, and the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality of included studies, while the pathophysiology of Long-COVID is still being explored.

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: This review discusses appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms, emphasizing the need to explain "why" and "how" treatments work rather than just "whether" they work.
items.curatedReason: 手法治疗的作用机制研究必须用因果设计来验证“为何”及“如何”起效，而不是停留在“是否”起效。这是方法学上的呼吁，帮你审视手法研究质量。
items.titleZh: 确定基于力的（手法治疗）治疗机制因果关系的转化设计
items.summaryZh: 本综述讨论了确定基于力的手法治疗机制因果关系的转化设计，强调需解释治疗“为何”及“如何”起效，而非仅停留在“是否”有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Manual therapy mechanism research needs causal designs to confirm "why" and "how" it works, not just "whether" it works. This methodological call helps you evaluate the quality of manual therapy studies.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注方法学讨论，未提供具体干预措施的临床效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review focusing on methodological discussions and does not provide clinical efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Elevance Health to exit small-group ACA market in 1 state
items.summary: Elevance Health is set to exit the small-group Affordable Care Act (ACA) market in one US state, potentially impacting insurance options for small businesses.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 退出俄亥俄州小团体 ACA 市场，这会影响当地小团体医疗保险的可及性和成本。你可能需要关注其对患者转介和报销政策的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: Elevance Health 将退出一州的小团体 ACA 市场
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 计划退出美国一州的小团体平价医疗法案（ACA）市场，可能影响小企业的保险选择。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's exit from the Ohio small-group ACA market will impact the availability and cost of small-group health insurance there. You may need to monitor its potential effects on patient referrals and reimbursement policies.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This study estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction followed by rehabilitation versus rehabilitation only, for improving knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 韧带重建（ACL）结合康复与单纯康复相比，其膝关节功能改善和重返运动所需的最小效应量已得到估算。这提供了实用的临床决策参考，帮助你与患者沟通手术与非手术治疗的预期效益。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有效效应：一项效益-风险权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 这项研究估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建结合康复与单纯康复相比，改善膝关节功能和重返运动的最小有效效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: The smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport has been estimated. This provides practical clinical decision-making reference, helping you communicate expected benefits of surgical versus non-surgical treatment with patients.
items.limitation: 研究的 benefit-harm trade-off 评估可能受限于患者偏好和感知风险的个体差异。
items.limitationEn: The benefit-harm trade-off assessment in the study may be limited by individual differences in patient preferences and perceived risks.

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: The 'Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment' conference, held in January 2026, brought together multidisciplinary experts to discuss future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 这次脊髓损伤多学科会议回顾了 SCI 护理和研究的最新方向，为该领域未来发展提供了重要视角。这提示你关注多学科合作和新兴技术对 SCI 康复的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 2026年1月在休斯顿举行的一场多学科会议“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：现在与未来”汇聚了临床医生、研究人员、工程师和脊髓损伤患者，探讨了脊髓损伤护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference reviewed the latest directions in SCI care and research, offering important perspectives on future developments in the field. This prompts you to pay attention to the potential impact of multidisciplinary collaboration and emerging technologies on SCI rehabilitation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified barriers, facilitators, and promising behavior change techniques for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的干预措施仍需改进。这份范围综述识别了潜在的障碍、促进因素和行为改变技术，你在设计康复方案时可以参考这些策略来鼓励患者活动，但需注意目前尚无确切的“最佳”干预方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景干预措施：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景的行为改变技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interventions to reduce sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation need improvement. This scoping review identifies potential barriers, facilitators, and behavior change techniques; you can refer to these strategies to encourage patient activity in your rehabilitation plans, but note there's no definitive 'best' intervention yet.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重广度而非深度，无法提供具体干预措施的疗效量化数据。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review prioritizes breadth over depth, so it cannot provide quantified efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Management in Lateral Medullary Stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome): A Scoping Review and Evidence Map.
items.summary: A scoping review and evidence map provides a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome), distinguishing direct intervention evidence from management and assessment reports.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述和证据图为外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预提供了全面的概览。它帮你识别现有证据和知识空白，从而更好地指导临床实践和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复和管理：范围综述和证据图
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和证据图全面概述了外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预措施，并区分了直接干预证据与管理和评估报告。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review and evidence map provide a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome). It helps you identify existing evidence and knowledge gaps, guiding clinical practice and future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于不进行证据质量评估，因此无法对特定干预措施的有效性给出强推荐。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of scoping reviews is that they do not assess evidence quality, thus precluding strong recommendations for specific interventions.

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study in India identified that chronic low back pain patients face barriers to physiotherapy due to cultural factors like pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and low awareness of PT's role.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了印度文化背景下慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知障碍，例如对疼痛的污名化、过度依赖止痛药和缺乏PT意识。了解这些能帮你更好地与患者沟通，降低依从性屏障。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在印度的定性研究发现，慢性腰痛患者在寻求物理治疗时面临文化障碍，如疼痛污名化、过度依赖止痛药及对PT作用认知不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights barriers to physiotherapy perception among chronic LBP patients in India, such as pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and lack of PT awareness. Understanding these factors can help you improve patient communication and adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍性受限于特定文化背景。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative study findings is limited by specific cultural contexts.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=56) found that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing was feasible and showed promising effects on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且有效的。这些辅助手段为多发性硬化症患者的步态训练提供了有前景的策略。
items.titleZh: 节律性听觉提示和/或视觉反馈跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者步态参数的可行性及效果：一项临床随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=56）发现，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且显示出积极效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for gait parameters in Multiple Sclerosis patients. These adjuncts offer promising strategies for gait training in MS.
items.limitation: 该研究为临床可行性试验，样本量（N=56）较小，且主要关注短期步态参数，长期功能改善仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a clinical feasibility trial with a small sample size (N=56), primarily focusing on short-term gait parameters; long-term functional improvement requires further validation.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified common barriers to early mobility in pediatric ICU patients with traumatic brain injury, including sedation, mechanical ventilation, and medical instability.
items.curatedReason: 对于儿童创伤性脑损伤患者，早期活动面临多种障碍，包括镇静和通气。你在设计康复方案时，应识别并尽可能解决这些可控因素，以促进更早的活动。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动中的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤患者在儿科ICU中早期活动的情况，并识别了镇静、机械通气等主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury faces multiple barriers, including sedation and ventilation. When designing rehabilitation protocols, you should identify and, where possible, address these modifiable factors to facilitate earlier activity.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心研究，结果可能受到选择偏倚的影响，且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective single-center study may be subject to selection bias and has limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized current evidence on technological interventions for gait rehabilitation in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury, highlighting their efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了创新技术在不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）步态康复中的潜力。在为 iSCI 患者设计康复方案时，你可以优先考虑整合这些有强证据支持的技术，以优化步态功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 不完全脊髓损伤步态康复中的创新技术：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析综合了不完全脊髓损伤成人步态康复中技术干预的现有证据，强调了其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the potential of innovative technologies in gait rehabilitation for incomplete spinal cord injury (iSCI). When designing rehabilitation protocols for iSCI patients, prioritize integrating these strongly evidenced technologies to optimize gait function recovery.
items.limitation: 不同技术类型、患者特征和随访时间上的异质性较高，限制了某些具体干预措施的普适性推荐。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in technology types, patient characteristics, and follow-up durations limits the generalizability of specific intervention recommendations.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 2-year follow-up found that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol was non-inferior to a longitudinal protocol for proximal hamstring avulsion repair, with similar clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 的两年随访数据证实，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤术后恢复中，与传统方案相比在临床结局、力量和功能对称性上具有非劣效性。这为你提供了更早介入主动康复的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案的两年结局：纵向与加速方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复后，与纵向方案在临床结局、力量和功能对称性方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Two-year follow-up data from this RCT confirm that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol is non-inferior to traditional protocols in clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry after proximal hamstring avulsion repair. This provides evidence to support earlier active rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究对象主要为运动员，其依从性和康复能力可能高于一般人群，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were primarily athletes, whose adherence and rehabilitation capabilities might be higher than the general population, so results should be extrapolated with caution.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Multidimensional factors associated with community reintegration in the early chronic phase after stroke: the role of fear-related activity avoidance.
items.summary: In the early chronic phase after stroke (3-6 months), multidimensional factors including fear-related activity avoidance are associated with community reintegration, with avoidance being a key factor for restricted participation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后早期慢性期（3-6个月）患者的社区回归受多维度因素影响，其中“恐惧相关活动回避”是关键因素。在康复中，除了身体功能，你需要更多关注患者的心理因素和回避行为。
items.titleZh: 卒中早期慢性期社区回归相关的多维度因素：恐惧相关活动回避的作用
items.summaryZh: 卒中后早期慢性期（3-6 个月）患者的社区回归受多维度因素影响，其中恐惧相关活动回避是限制参与的关键因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community reintegration in the early chronic phase (3-6 months) post-stroke is influenced by multidimensional factors, with "fear-related activity avoidance" being a key determinant. In rehabilitation, you need to pay more attention to psychological factors and avoidance behaviors in addition to physical function.
items.limitation: 本研究是观察性研究，不能确定因果关系，且主要关注早期慢性期。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality and primarily focused on the early chronic phase.

items.title: Physical Therapy Management of Children With Developmental Coordination Disorder: A 2026 Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline from the American Physical Therapy Association Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy
items.curatedReason: APTA 儿科物理治疗学会发布了 2026 年发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗循证临床实践指南。这是你在管理此类患者时的权威参考，务必深入研读并应用于实践。
items.titleZh: 2026 年美国物理治疗协会儿科物理治疗学会发布的《发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗管理循证临床实践指南》。
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会儿科物理治疗学会发布了 2026 年针对发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗管理的循证临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy has released its 2026 evidence-based clinical practice guideline for the physical therapy management of children with Developmental Coordination Disorder. This is an authoritative resource for managing these patients; you must study it thoroughly and apply it in practice.

items.title: APTA Orthopedics: Hip Pain and Mobility Deficits—Hip Osteoarthritis: Revision 2025
items.curatedReason: APTA 骨科分会发布了 2025 年髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎指南的修订版。这是髋关节骨关节炎物理治疗的黄金标准，请务必将其整合到你的临床决策中。
items.titleZh: APTA 骨科分会：髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎：2025 年修订版。
items.summaryZh: APTA 骨科分会发布了关于髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎的 2025 年修订版临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA Orthopedics section has released the 2025 revision of the Hip Pain and Mobility Deficits—Hip Osteoarthritis guideline. This is the gold standard for physical therapy in hip osteoarthritis; you must integrate it into your clinical decision-making.

items.title: Hand Pain and Sensory Deficits: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines
items.curatedReason: 腕管综合征 (Carpal Tunnel Syndrome) 的物理治疗临床实践指南已更新。这为你提供了最新的循证建议，确保你的评估和干预策略与时俱进。
items.titleZh: 手部疼痛和感觉缺陷：腕管综合征临床实践指南。
items.summaryZh: 针对手部疼痛和感觉缺陷的腕管综合征临床实践指南现已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical practice guidelines for physical therapy in Carpal Tunnel Syndrome have been updated. This provides you with the latest evidence-based recommendations, ensuring your assessment and intervention strategies are current.

items.title: Treatment Guideline for Foot and Ankle
items.curatedReason: 足踝治疗指南的发布，为你提供了处理足踝问题患者的最新循证框架。这直接指导你的临床实践，让你能更有效地管理这类常见问题。
items.titleZh: 足踝治疗指南。
items.summaryZh: 一项新的足踝治疗指南现已发布，旨在指导临床实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: The release of the Foot and Ankle Treatment Guideline provides you with the latest evidence-based framework for managing patients with foot and ankle issues. This directly guides your clinical practice, enabling you to manage these common problems more effectively.

items.title: Therapeutic Management of Pediatric Hypermobility Spectrum Disorder: An Evidence-Based Care Guideline
items.curatedReason: 针对儿童高活动度谱系障碍的循证护理指南已发布。这意味着你在管理这类患者时，有了一套明确、科学的评估和干预框架，避免经验主义。
items.titleZh: 儿童高活动度谱系障碍的治疗管理：循证护理指南。
items.summaryZh: 一项关于儿童高活动度谱系障碍治疗管理的循证护理指南已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: An evidence-based care guideline for pediatric hypermobility spectrum disorder has been released. This means you now have a clear, scientific framework for assessment and intervention when managing these patients, avoiding empiricism.

items.title: American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons: Management of Rotator Cuff Injuries Clinical Practice Guideline
items.curatedReason: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。作为物理治疗师，理解这份指南将帮助你更好地与骨科医生协作，优化肩袖损伤患者的综合管理。
items.titleZh: 美国骨科医师学会：肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。
items.summaryZh: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理的临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons has published clinical practice guidelines for the management of rotator cuff injuries. As a physical therapist, understanding these guidelines will help you collaborate more effectively with orthopedic surgeons and optimize comprehensive management for patients with rotator cuff injuries.

items.title: Global Strategy for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Management of COPD
items.curatedReason: 这是一项关于 COPD 预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。虽然不是直接的物理治疗指南，但了解这些宏观策略有助于你将物理治疗干预与整体管理框架相结合。
items.titleZh: COPD 预防、诊断和管理全球策略。
items.summaryZh: 这是一项关于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a global strategy guideline for the prevention, diagnosis, and management of COPD. While not a direct physiotherapy guideline, understanding these macro strategies helps you integrate physiotherapy interventions within the overall management framework.

items.title: Prescribing Exercise and Designing Physical Activity Programs for People With Disabilities
items.curatedReason: 这项指南关注为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。它提醒你在评估残疾患者时，不仅要关注功能受限，更要积极融入运动和身体活动以改善其整体健康和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。
items.summaryZh: 此指南提供了为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This guideline focuses on prescribing exercise and designing physical activity programs for people with disabilities. It reminds you that when assessing patients with disabilities, you should not only focus on functional limitations but also actively integrate exercise and physical activity to improve their overall health and quality of life.

items.title: Concerns about practitioners
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 关于从业者担忧的指引提供了在澳大利亚报告执业不当行为的途径和流程。这提醒你作为专业人士的伦理责任，以及维护行业标准的机制。
items.titleZh: 对从业者的担忧。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供关于对医疗从业者担忧的指引和报告流程。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA's guidance on practitioner concerns outlines the avenues and processes for reporting professional misconduct in Australia. This reminds you of your ethical responsibilities as a professional and the mechanisms for maintaining industry standards.

items.title: What are registration standards?
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 解释了注册标准是什么以及它们对执业的意义。这帮助你理解在澳大利亚执业的基石要求，是确保合规执业的基础。
items.titleZh: 什么是注册标准？
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 解释了注册标准的定义及其在医疗执业中的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA explains what registration standards are and their implications for practice. This helps you understand the fundamental requirements for practicing in Australia, which is essential for ensuring compliant practice.

items.title: I have a concern - where can I report?
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 提供了关于如何报告对健康从业者担忧的指引。这对于维护患者安全和行业职业操守至关重要，是你作为专业人士应了解的流程。
items.titleZh: 我有一个担忧——在哪里可以报告？
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了关于如何报告对医疗从业者担忧的指引。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA provides guidance on how to report concerns about a health practitioner. This is crucial for maintaining patient safety and professional integrity in the industry, and it's a process you, as a professional, should be aware of.

items.title: Companionship as a mediator of the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes: Findings in individuals with spinal cord injury.
items.summary: This study found that companionship mediates the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes in individuals with spinal cord injury, after controlling for demographic, injury, and socioeconomic factors.
items.curatedReason: 陪伴在脊髓损伤患者的婚姻状况与心理社会结局之间发挥中介作用。这提示在康复中，除了身体功能，也要关注患者的社会支持和伴侣关系，这可能直接影响他们的心理健康。
items.titleZh: 陪伴在脊髓损伤患者婚姻状况与心理社会结局关系中的中介作用。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在控制了人口统计学、损伤和经济社会特征后，陪伴在脊髓损伤患者的婚姻状况与心理社会结局之间起中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Companionship mediates the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes in individuals with spinal cord injury. This suggests that during rehabilitation, in addition to physical function, you should also pay attention to patients' social support and marital relationships, as these may directly impact their mental health.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to determine causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.titleZh: 2025 年成人高血压预防、检测、评估和管理指南。
items.summaryZh: 2025 年成人高血压的预防、检测、评估和管理指南已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2025 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults has been released. While primarily for physicians, understanding these guidelines helps you better identify risks in hypertensive patients and advise on exercise and lifestyle interventions during rehabilitation.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (N=54 analyzed) found 12 sessions of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (Numeric Rating Scale: -6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001) and function (MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001) compared to sham in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP) patients at 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 高强度激光治疗（HILT）在股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）疼痛和功能改善上显著优于假治疗，并可能改善神经传导。可以将其作为一种有效的非侵入性治疗手段纳入你的方案。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压综合征的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（N=54分析）发现，对于股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）患者，12周内12次高强度激光治疗（HILT）在改善疼痛（数字评定量表：-6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001）和功能（MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001）方面显著优于假治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly outperforms sham treatment for pain and functional improvement in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP), and may also improve nerve conduction. You can incorporate it as an effective non-invasive treatment option into your protocols.
items.limitation: 随访期相对较短（12周），长期疗效仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period was relatively short (12 weeks), and long-term efficacy requires further investigation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: What does best practice care for musculoskeletal pain look like ...
items.summary: A systematic review identified eleven consistent recommendations from high-quality clinical practice guidelines for best practice care in musculoskeletal pain.
items.curatedReason: 这 11 项建议是从各国高质量指南里反复出现的共识提炼出来的——筛红旗征、做教育、保持活动、克制影像转诊。拿它当你 MSK 诊疗的对照清单：你的常规里缺哪条，比再读十篇单项 RCT 都值得先补上。
items.titleZh: 肌骨疼痛最佳实践指南共识
items.summaryZh: 系统综述从高质量临床实践指南中提炼出 11 项肌骨疼痛管理的一致性推荐。
items.curatedReasonEn: These 11 items are the signal that survived across multiple high-quality guidelines—screen for red flags, educate your patient, keep them moving, resist the reflex to image. Treat this as your MSK checklist; whichever item you're skipping in routine practice outweighs reading ten more RCTs on single interventions.

items.title: 肩關節鏡術後復健怎麼做才對？旋轉肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩實證指南
items.summary: A comprehensive Chinese evidence-based guideline details post-arthroscopy rehabilitation protocols for rotator cuff, Bankart, SLAP, and adhesive capsulitis, emphasizing activity timing based on tear size.
items.curatedReason: 这篇中文指南详细阐述了肩关节镜术后（旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩）的实证康复方案，并强调了根据撕裂大小决定早期活动时机的重要性。如果你在中文市场执业或服务中文患者，这提供了最新且基于证据的临床指导，可以直接用于你的康复计划制定。
items.titleZh: 肩关节镜术后康复：旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩实证指南发布
items.summaryZh: 一部综合性中文实证指南详述了旋转肌袖修复、Bankart、SLAP及五十肩术后的康复方案，强调早期活动时机应依据撕裂大小分层决定。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Chinese-language guideline spells out exactly when to move after shoulder scope—based on tear size, not calendar days. Use the protocols directly with your Chinese-speaking patients and stop guessing on early-phase progression for rotator cuff, Bankart, SLAP, and frozen shoulder.

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different physical therapy methods and techniques in improving symptoms triggered by endometriosis.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了物理治疗技术在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性。在临床实践中，你可以依据这些证据，考虑将特定的物理治疗干预整合到子宫内膜异位症患者的综合治疗方案中。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析评估了不同物理治疗方法和技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in managing endometriosis symptoms. In clinical practice, you can consider integrating specific physical therapy interventions into comprehensive treatment plans for endometriosis patients based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量存在差异，且许多研究样本量较小，可能影响结果的综合强度。
items.limitationEn: Variations in methodological quality and small sample sizes in many included studies may affect the overall strength of the results.

items.title: "Comparison Between Robotic and Conventional Walking Recovery Training Methods in People With Spinal Cord Injury": Systematic Review with Pairwise and Network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of 16 studies compared Robotic Body Weight Supported Treadmill Training (RBWSTT), Overground Robotic Exoskeleton Training (ORET), and Conventional Physiotherapy (CP) on gait and cardiovascular outcomes in individuals with Spinal Cord Injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓损伤患者的步行恢复训练，机器人辅助训练（RBWSTT, ORET）与传统物理治疗的疗效对比仍存在争议。在具体患者选择时，结合伤情、资源和个体反应，可以考虑作为传统治疗的辅助或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机器人与传统步行恢复训练方法在脊髓损伤患者中的比较：系统综述与配对及网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含16项研究的系统综述和网络荟萃分析比较了机器人体重支持跑步机训练（RBWSTT）、地面机器人外骨骼训练（ORET）和传统物理治疗（CP）对脊髓损伤患者步态和心血管结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparison between robotic-assisted training (RBWSTT, ORET) and conventional physiotherapy for walking recovery in SCI patients remains controversial. When selecting for specific patients, consider robotic options as adjuncts or alternatives to conventional therapy, based on injury characteristics, resources, and individual response.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=16）数量较少，不同干预类型和患者亚组间的比较数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=16) was small, and comparative data between different intervention types and patient subgroups were limited.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Community-Based Exercise for Chronic Pain in People with Spinal Cord Injury: A Pragmatic Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial tested the hypothesis that home/community-based exercise, prescribed according to the Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) Exercise Guidelines, reduces chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 按照脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的社区居家运动方案，有望有效减轻慢性疼痛。这坐实了指南的重要性，并支持你推广此类社区康复模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤者慢性疼痛的社区运动：一项实用随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项实用随机对照试验旨在验证根据脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的居家/社区运动方案是否能减轻慢性疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community- and home-based exercise programs, prescribed according to SCI Exercise Guidelines, are likely effective in reducing chronic pain. This affirms the importance of these guidelines and supports your promotion of such community rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 未提供具体研究方法和结果数据，无法评估具体效应量和局限性。
items.limitationEn: Specific research methods and outcome data were not provided, making it impossible to assess specific effect sizes and limitations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: GIRFT launches best practice tool to support primary care colleagues to assess and manage patients with spinal pain - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: GIRFT (Getting It Right First Time) launched a best practice tool in the UK to assist primary care practitioners in assessing and managing patients with spinal pain.
items.curatedReason: 英国GIRFT推出了一款支持初级保健评估和管理脊柱疼痛患者的最佳实践工具。虽然针对初级保健，但你作为PT，了解上游的评估和管理流程，能帮助你更好地与初级保健医生协作，并理解患者转诊前的诊疗路径。
items.titleZh: 英国GIRFT发布脊柱疼痛初级评估与管理最佳实践工具
items.summaryZh: 英国GIRFT推出一款最佳实践工具，旨在帮助初级保健从业者评估和管理脊柱疼痛患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This upstream tool shapes the referral you're about to receive. Dig into it so you know what was ruled in or out before the patient lands in your clinic—your initial PT exam just got more efficient because you can skip the parts primary care already did.

items.title: Pelvic floor workout may Reduce Postpartum Stress Urinary Incontinence: JAMA
items.summary: A report in JAMA suggests that pelvic floor workouts may significantly reduce postpartum stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: JAMA发表的这篇文章指出盆底肌锻炼可能减少产后压力性尿失禁。作为PT，如果你服务产后女性，这项重要发现可以强化你向患者推广和实施盆底肌康复训练的信心，并为你的临床实践提供有力证据。
items.titleZh: JAMA：盆底肌训练可减少产后压力性尿失禁
items.summaryZh: JAMA报告称，盆底肌训练可显著减少产后压力性尿失禁。
items.curatedReasonEn: JAMA just gave you the ammunition you need when a postpartum patient doubts pelvic floor exercises will work. This isn't a small trial—it's JAMA-level evidence. Hand it to your patient and close the conversation on whether they should bother.

items.title: PhysiCase: Development and dual-layer validation of synthetic cases for health professional education: A pilot study leveraging Generative AI
items.summary: The PhysiCase project developed and dual-layer validated synthetic cases for health professional education using Generative AI, addressing privacy and ethical barriers associated with real-world clinical records.
items.curatedReason: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发和验证合成病例，这在健康专业教育中具有重要意义。这意味着 AI 生成的临床病例有望克服真实病例的隐私和伦理障碍，为你提供高质量的训练材料，并推动 AI 在教育中的应用。
items.titleZh: PhysiCase：利用生成式 AI 开发和双层验证用于健康专业教育的合成病例：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发并双层验证了用于健康专业教育的合成病例，解决了真实临床记录相关的隐私和伦理障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PhysiCase project, utilizing generative AI for developing and validating synthetic cases, holds significant importance in health professional education. This means AI-generated clinical cases could overcome privacy and ethical barriers of real cases, providing you with high-quality training materials and advancing AI application in education.

items.title: Subregion-Specific Prefrontal Activation Predicts Fall Risk and Fall Timing in Older Adults with Mild Cognitive Impairment
items.summary: This study found that subregion-specific prefrontal cortex activation during dual-task walking predicts fall risk and fall timing in older adults with mild cognitive impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，双任务行走时前额叶皮层（PFC）激活模式可预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）老年人的跌倒风险和首次跌倒时间。将神经影像学指标纳入风险评估，有望更精细地识别高风险人群，并指导更精准的预防干预。
items.titleZh: 亚区域特异性前额叶激活可预测轻度认知障碍老年人的跌倒风险和跌倒时间。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，双任务行走时前额叶皮层特定区域的激活可预测轻度认知障碍老年人的跌倒风险和首次跌倒时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that prefrontal cortex (PFC) activation patterns during dual-task walking can predict fall risk and time to first fall in older adults with mild cognitive impairment (MCI). Integrating neuroimaging markers into risk assessment holds promise for more precise identification of high-risk individuals and guiding targeted preventive interventions.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于轻度认知障碍老年人，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study population is limited to older adults with mild cognitive impairment, so the results may not be generalizable to other populations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Perspectives on an advanced practice physiotherapy-led model for musculoskeletal care in Canada: A qualitative study of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Canada reveals that while Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP) shows promise in musculoskeletal care, systemic barriers limit its integration, highlighting diverse perspectives from patients and clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 加拿大一项定性研究揭示了患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式的看法。APP在减轻全球医疗系统负担方面表现出潜力，但加拿大在系统整合上仍有障碍。这为希望深入了解 APP 模式在不同国家实施挑战和机遇的同行提供了宝贵视角。
items.titleZh: 加拿大高级实践物理治疗师主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式视角：一项患者和多学科临床医生的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 加拿大一项定性研究显示，患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式持积极态度，但其在加拿大仍面临系统性整合障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from Canada explores the perceptions of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians regarding Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP)-led musculoskeletal care. While APP shows promise in reducing healthcare burden globally, Canada faces systemic integration barriers. This offers valuable insight for peers interested in the implementation challenges and opportunities of APP models in various countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，结果可能不具备广泛代表性，且受访者数量有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, so its findings may not be broadly generalizable and the number of participants is limited.

items.title: Development of a predictive model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury.
items.summary: A clinical prediction model was developed to forecast postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury, a prevalent issue lacking sufficient predictive tools.
items.curatedReason: 该研究开发了预测不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复的模型。这个模型有助于你与患者沟通预后，并为性康复干预提供更早期的风险分层依据。
items.titleZh: 不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复预测模型的开发
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发了一个临床预测模型，用于预测不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤（CSCI）男性患者术后勃起功能恢复，以弥补当前预测工具的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a predictive model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury. This model helps you communicate prognosis to patients and provides earlier risk stratification for sexual rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性患者，且需外部验证来确认模型在不同人群中的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to male patients, and external validation is needed to confirm the model's generalizability in diverse populations.
items.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society

items.title: Early Self-Efficacy Predicts Short- and Long-Term Pain and Functional Outcomes Following Lower Extremity Fracture
items.summary: This study aimed to identify which early psychosocial measures, particularly self-efficacy, are most predictive of short- and long-term pain severity, pain interference, physical function, and chronic pain following lower extremity fractures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现早期自我效能感能预测下肢骨折患者短期和长期的疼痛与功能结局。这提示你，在康复早期评估并干预患者的自我效能感，可能对改善其长期康复效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 早期自我效能感预测下肢骨折后的短期和长期疼痛及功能结局
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在确定早期心理社会测量，特别是自我效能感，在下肢骨折恢复过程中对疼痛严重程度、疼痛干扰、身体功能和慢性疼痛的短期和长期预测作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that early self-efficacy predicts short- and long-term pain and functional outcomes in patients with lower extremity fractures. This suggests that assessing and intervening on patients' self-efficacy early in rehabilitation may be crucial for improving long-term rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究未明确说明样本量和随访长度，可能影响结果的强度和普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study does not clearly state the sample size and follow-up duration, which may affect the strength and generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Early post-hospital trajectories of health-related quality of life for younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury
items.summary: This study characterized the early post-hospital trajectories of health-related quality of life (HRQOL) in younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury (TBI) during the first 8 weeks after discharge from acute care.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描绘了年轻创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者出院后早期（8周内）健康相关生活质量的轨迹。这为你提供了 TBI 患者急性期后 HRQOL 恢复模式的关键信息，有助于你更早地识别潜在问题并制定个性化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 年轻成人创伤性脑损伤患者出院后健康相关生活质量的早期轨迹
items.summaryZh: 本研究描述了年轻成人创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者在急性医院护理出院后8周内，健康相关生活质量（HRQOL）的早期轨迹。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study outlines the early (within 8 weeks) post-discharge trajectories of health-related quality of life for younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury (TBI). This provides you with crucial information on HRQOL recovery patterns after the acute phase in TBI patients, helping you identify potential issues earlier and develop personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是早期（8周内）轨迹，缺乏更长期的随访数据来评估远期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on early trajectories (within 8 weeks) and lacks longer-term follow-up data to assess distant outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Changes in Unimanual and Bimanual Upper Extremity Use During the Subacute Phase Post-Stroke Assessed in Supervised and Unsupervised Contexts.
items.summary: 一项纵向研究评估了卒中亚急性期患者在监督和非监督环境下，单手与双手上肢使用模式的变化。
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了卒中亚急性期患侧上肢功能恢复的细微模式，尤其区分了监督和非监督环境下的单手与双手使用情况。这提醒你在居家指导中需关注非监督环境下的实际使用情况。
items.titleZh: 卒中亚急性期在监督和非监督环境下患侧上肢单手与双手使用情况的变化
items.summaryZh: 这项纵向研究在卒中亚急性期评估了患者在监督和非监督两种情境下，患侧上肢单手和双手使用模式如何随时间变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals subtle patterns of paretic upper extremity recovery in subacute stroke, particularly differentiating unimanual and bimanual use in supervised versus unsupervised contexts. This highlights the importance of observing actual usage in unsupervised settings during home guidance.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Sex and gender differences in technology-based rehabilitation for people with stroke: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped evidence on sex and gender differences in technology-assisted stroke rehabilitation, identifying significant gaps and highlighting the need for equitable approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述突出了中风技术辅助康复中性别差异研究的不足。你在设计康复方案或评估技术工具时，请留意这种潜在偏倚，并期待未来有更多针对性的研究来指导临床实践。
items.titleZh: 中风患者技术辅助康复中性别差异的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了技术辅助中风康复中性别差异的证据，发现显著的空白，并强调了采取公平方法的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights the lack of research on sex and gender differences in technology-assisted stroke rehabilitation. When designing rehabilitation programs or evaluating tech tools, be mindful of this potential bias and anticipate more targeted research to guide future clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重于文献映射而非证据综合分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focusing on mapping literature rather than synthesizing evidence comprehensively.

items.title: From rehabilitation to performance: reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimise sports performance.
items.summary: This article discusses reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimize sports performance, moving beyond traditional rehabilitation contexts.
items.curatedReason: 将前庭-眼动干预从传统康复范畴扩展至运动表现优化，提供了新的视角。这提示你，在评估和训练运动员时，可以考虑整合这些技术以提升运动表现和减少伤害风险。
items.titleZh: 从康复到表现：重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现，超越了传统的康复语境。
items.curatedReasonEn: Reframing vestibular-ocular interventions from traditional rehabilitation to sports performance optimization offers a new perspective. This suggests that when assessing and training athletes, you can consider integrating these techniques to enhance athletic performance and reduce injury risk.

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine studies (N=490) found that exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation was effective in improving aerobic capacity for people with stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者，基于运动的心脏康复似乎能有效改善有氧能力。考虑将心脏康复元素整合到神经康复方案中，尤其对于有氧能力受损的患者。
items.titleZh: 心脏康复计划在改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者有氧能力方面的有效性：快速综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含9项研究（N=490）的快速综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的心脏康复在改善卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者的有氧能力方面是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with stroke or TIA, exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation appears effective in improving aerobic capacity. Consider integrating cardiac rehabilitation elements into your neurorehabilitation programs, especially for those with impaired aerobic capacity.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=490）数量较少，且质量多为低至中等。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=490) was small, and their quality was mostly low to moderate.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than cracking sound: a randomized controlled EEG study
items.summary: A randomized controlled EEG study found that short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than the cracking sound.
items.curatedReason: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松感，似乎与体感输入而非“咔哒声”更相关。这提示你应更关注手法对神经生理的影响，而不是仅以关节弹响作为疗效指标。
items.titleZh: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关：一项随机对照脑电图研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照脑电图研究发现，颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation appears more associated with somatosensory input than the "cracking sound." This suggests you should focus more on the neurophysiological effects of manual therapy rather than solely using joint cavitation as an indicator of efficacy.
items.limitation: 该研究为随机对照脑电图研究，但可能存在样本量和结局指标的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled EEG study, but may have limitations in sample size and outcome measures.
